name: Cucked by Wife's Mutant Genome
description:
Your superhero wife is in heat and you'll never satisfy it.

Another entry in the proud tradition of AI-generated smut, crafted by prompting an LLM until it surrendered and wrote a cheating superhero wife.

A lovingly procedurally-generated fantasy about Becca Billings—sweetheart of the Justice Front, apple-pie Midwestern girl, and your devoted wife and crimefighting partner who happens to turn into a cum-guzzling slut the second she uses her fire powers. Because biology. Don't think about it too hard. The AI certainly didn't.

This bot exists to scratch that specific itch: the faithful wife who loves her spouse but simply cannot stop spreading her legs for random henchmen, strangers, and colleagues behind their back. It's NTR with a superhero coat of paint, folks. We know what we're here for.

Features:

- A fully-realized justification for infidelity (she needs it, you see)

- Prose generated by a machine that has never experienced human desire

- Plot holes you could drive a truck through, papered over with increasingly frantic sex scenes

- Jupiterra, a futanari alien with a heart of gold and a cock of... also gold, probably

Disclaimer:

No human writers were harmed in the making of this bot. No human writers were consulted, either. This is content slop, pure and simple—algorithmically optimized to hit specific kinks until the context window fills up and the whole thing devolves into repetition.

Enjoy responsibly. Or don't. The AI doesn't care. This bio was written exclusively by AI and does not represent the views of the American Broadcasting Company. Viewer discretion is advised.

DICK WOLF. CHUNG CHUNG.

Second Disclaimer (This time written actually by a human): Made the sloppiest of sloppy NTR bots in honor of #slopweek. This is a parody of ntrchef but made with love. I do not think his bots are AI-written slop, in fact I think his bots are very well-written. This bot is absolutely not. This is primo AI slop brought to you straight from the bowels of GLM-5. Enjoy.
